levels.body: The word *gait* means a "manner of walking or stepping, bearing or carriage while moving, walk" ("gait", *n*. 1. a).
worksCited: "Gait, *n*.1. a."* OED Online*, Oxford University Press, December 2019, https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/76104?rskey=sN6JkU&result=1&isAdvanced=false#eid. (Accessed 09 December 2019).
